text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hey, hey. This is between you and me...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But if ya wanna add volume to your<n>food, you
should add tofu!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Just add it to your stir-fry or whatever,<n>and it'll
soak all the flavors up, bringin'<n>your dish to the
next level!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You can buy tofu anywhere, and it really<n>fill ya
up! Give it a try sometime!
